description: Canadian human trafficking ring composed of an extended Romani family from Pápa, Hungary. The organization moved to Hamilton, Ontario, and lured up to 19 people from Hungary starting in 2008, forcing them into unfree labor. Leader Ferenc Dömötör was arrested in 2010, and multiple members were convicted and deported.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Dömötör-Kolompár criminal organization was a Canadian human trafficking ring... they settled in Hamilton, Ontario.
country_links.context: The organization moved to Canada, settled there, and carried out human trafficking and forced labor on Canadian soil.
